summary: Tested 4 frontend features for POS Restaurant System: 1) Funciones Menu in OrderScreen - WORKING, 2) Mover Mesa Dialog - WORKING, 3) Auto-send to Kitchen - WORKING, 4) Mobile Scroll on Payment Screen - WORKING. All features verified successfully via Playwright UI testing.
passed_tests: Funciones Menu: Button visible with data-testid='functions-menu-btn'
Funciones Menu: Popover opens with 4 options (Mover Mesa, Dividir Cuenta, Reimprimir Comanda, Descuento Especial)
Funciones Menu: Mover Mesa is functional (no 'Pronto' badge)
Funciones Menu: Dividir Cuenta shows 'Pronto' badge (placeholder)
Funciones Menu: Reimprimir Comanda shows 'Pronto' badge (placeholder)
Funciones Menu: Descuento Especial shows 'Pronto' badge (placeholder)
Mover Mesa Dialog: Opens when clicking fn-move-table button
Mover Mesa Dialog: Shows all areas (Salon Principal, Terraza, Bar, VIP)
Mover Mesa Dialog: Shows all tables with correct status (Libre, Ocupada, Reservada, Dividida)
Auto-send to Kitchen: Console log confirms 'Comanda enviada exitosamente' when navigating away with pending items
Auto-send to Kitchen: Table status changes from green (free) to red (occupied) after order auto-sent
Mobile Payment Screen: Screen loads correctly at 375x812 viewport
Mobile Payment Screen: All 6 payment methods visible (Efectivo RD$, Tarjeta Credito, Tarjeta Debito, Transferencia, USD DOLAR, EUR)
Mobile Payment Screen: Quick amounts visible (100, 200, 500, 1K, 2K, 5K)
Mobile Payment Screen: Scroll container exists with overflow-auto
Mobile Payment Screen: Mouse wheel scroll works to reveal CANCELAR and CONFIRMAR PAGO buttons
Mobile Payment Screen: CONFIRMAR PAGO button accessible after scroll (buttonInView: True)
seed_data_creation: Used existing Table 5 with order containing 'Morir Sonando' beverage for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested features are working correctly. Funciones menu implemented in OrderScreen.js lines 1225-1289. Auto-send logic in lines 214-264. Mobile payment scroll works via mouse.wheel(). To access order screen, use PIN 1234 (Carlos/Mesero) and click on a free (green) table. Use JS evaluate to click elements that may be blocked by 'Made with Emergent' badge: page.evaluate('document.querySelector("selector").click()')
